title: Crunchy Rye Flatbread
description: A simple flatbread recipe with crunchy texture and rye flavor. Perfect as a snack or side dish.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine rye flour and crushed crunchy bread.
2. Gradually add Greek yogurt and mix until dough forms.
4. Divide dough into 4-6 portions, depending on desired flatbread size.
5. Roll out each portion into thin circle.
6. Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
7. Cook flatbreads for 2-3 minutes on each side, until lightly browned.
8. Brush with olive oil and serve hot.
